error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect - check serial number
error.cannot_connect_ip: Failed to connect - check IP address

data_description.ip_address: The IP address of your Nobø Ecohub.
data_description.serial: The full 12-digit serial number printed on the back of your Nobø Ecohub.

manual.description: Configure a Nobø Ecohub not discovered on your local network. Enter the complete serial number (12 digits) and its IP address.

data_description.serial_suffix: The last 3 digits of the serial number printed on the back of your Nobø Ecohub.

selected.description:
Configuring {hub}.

To connect to the hub, enter the last 3 digits of the hub's serial number.

data_description.device: Select the Nobø Ecohub discovered on your local network, or choose manual entry.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to Nobø Ecohub with serial {serial} at {ip}; will retry. If the hub is on a different network from Home Assistant and has changed IP address, remove and re-add the integration.

data.block_overrides: Block overrides from the Nobø app
data.report_setpoint_as_current: Report setpoint as current temperature (zones without a sensor)

data_description.managed_zones: Zones this integration controls. Each becomes an Off/Heat thermostat. Unmanaged zones are left untouched. Removing a zone restores its original week profile.
data_description.block_overrides: Set the hub to reject app overrides on managed zones, so the integration's state is enforced automatically. Recommended.
data_description.clear_global_overrides: Also reset any non-normal global override back to normal. This affects unmanaged zones too.
data_description.report_setpoint_as_current: For zones whose panel has no temperature sensor, show the target temperature as the current temperature instead of nothing. This avoids HomeKit displaying a misleading fallback value, and lights the heating indicator while the zone is on. Zones that do have a sensor are unaffected.
data_description.poll_interval: How often (seconds) to re-check the hub as a safety net, in addition to the instant push-driven enforcement.

init.description: Configure which zones are managed and how external changes are handled.

restore_zone.name: Restore zone
restore_zone.description: Restore a zone to its pre-takeover week profile and override setting, and stop managing it until reconfigured.

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: The Nobø zone id to restore.
